title: amphineurion marginatum
intro: Amphineurion marginatum, also known as the Water Spangle or Amphineuron, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amphineurion marginatum are said to include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Amphineurion marginatum can be made by infusing the leaves in water to create a tea or by using the plant in combination with other herbs in a poultice or salve.
